reviews.comment:
Servicio de lavando al paso, el secado y aspirado es mucho que desear! No volvería y no se lo recomendaría a nadie, del precio mejor no hablar.

(Translated by Google)
The car wash service is great, but the drying and vacuuming are far from ideal! I wouldn't go back and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone. The price is even worse.
